data.content: Implemented option 1. Foolery now emits a semantic beat_state_observed event as soon as post-exit backend state is observed, and the client invalidates both shared beat queries and Setlist fallback queries immediately instead of waiting for exit-only refresh. Focused tests were added for the query invalidation path and event emission, and the full quality gates passed in /Users/cartine/foolery/.worktrees/foolery-9e12.
